enableLSP.title: Enable LSP-based optimization
enableLSP.description: Use Language Server Protocol for code optimization

lspTimeout.title: LSP timeout (ms)
lspTimeout.description: Maximum time to wait for LSP response

fallbackToRuleBased.title: Fallback to rule-based
fallbackToRuleBased.description: Fall back to rule-based if LSP fails

enableLLM.title: Enable LLM-based optimization
enableLLM.description: Use Large Language Model for code optimization

llmProvider.title: LLM Provider
llmProvider.description: LLM provider to use (openai, anthropic, or google)

llmModel.title: LLM Model
llmModel.description: LLM model to use (e.g., gemini-2.0-flash, gpt-4, claude-3-5-sonnet-20241022)

llmBaseUrl.title: LLM Base URL
llmBaseUrl.description: Custom base URL for LLM API (optional)

llmTimeout.title: LLM timeout (ms)
llmTimeout.description: Maximum time to wait for LLM response

llmFallbackToLSP.title: Fallback to LSP
llmFallbackToLSP.description: Fall back to LSP if LLM fails

llmFallbackToRuleBased.title: Fallback to rule-based
llmFallbackToRuleBased.description: Fall back to rule-based if LLM and LSP fail
